hooks.command: nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true

{ nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true; } && printf '
---
Context was compacted. If you discovered important insights, save them:
  nmem m add "<insight>" -t "Title" -i 0.8
'
